briefs.title: BC Business Corporations Regulation amended to recognise Indigenous nation ownership structures
briefs.summary: B.C. Reg. 3/2026 amends the Business Corporations Regulation to define 'Indigenous nation' and 'professional limited liability partnership,' and clarifies when a corporation is considered wholly owned by one or more Indigenous nations.
briefs.action_required: Review your corporate ownership structure if it involves Indigenous nations or professional LLPs to confirm compliance with updated definitions.
